flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Springfield College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1k → 1.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Springfield College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.5k → $45.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Springfield College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.5k → $45.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Springfield College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (67.6% vs 73.0%).
